title: Knowledge Base Schema v2.0 (Flexible)
description: Flexible knowledge base schema supporting multiple knowledge domains. Allows any knowledge_base name and source_type while maintaining structural integrity and metadata requirements.

knowledge_base.description: Name of the knowledge base domain (e.g., 'Product CGI Prompt Engineering', 'Application Security', etc.)

last_updated.description: Date when the knowledge base was last updated (YYYY-MM-DD)

source_type.description: Type or source of the knowledge (e.g., 'reference guide (structured)', 'vendor documentation', 'community consensus', etc.)

entries.description: Array of knowledge entries, each with a category and statements

category.description: Category or topic name for this group of statements

statements.description: Array of factual statements or guidance within this category

snite_metadata.description: Metadata for SNiTE (Secure Neutralized Information Transfer Engine) processing and tracking

processed_by.description: Agent or system that processed this knowledge base

security_clearance.description: Security clearance level for this knowledge base

no_training_clause.description: Whether this knowledge is protected from external training use

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this knowledge base was processed
